problem id: a60c36ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00010101 -> 00011011
  01000100 -> 01101110
  01010010 -> 00101111
  10110100 -> 01011011
  11101101 -> 00101110
  00000001 -> 10011111
  00010010 -> 00111011
  10110011 -> 01111011
  11110100 -> 01001111

query: 11000111
predicted answer: 11101110
